   cybersecurity_threat_detection_schema


SCHEMA cybersecurity_threat_detection_schema {acme standard 5000 part(130) version(1) object(1) cybersecurity-threat-detection-schema(1)};

(* TYPE                   5 *)
(* ENTITY                10 *)
(* FUNCTION               0 *)
(* PROCEDURE              0 *)
(* RULE                   0 *)
(* SUBTYPE_CONSTRAINT     0 *)

  TYPE CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.detection_method;
  TYPE CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.network_protocol;
  TYPE CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_category;
  TYPE CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_severity_level;
  TYPE CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_status;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.incident_response;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.risk_assessment;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.security_alert;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.security_event;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.security_policy;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.security_rule;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_detection;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_indicator;
  ENTITY CYBERSECURITY_THREAT_DETECTION_SCHEMA.threat_intelligence;
